news_items.headline: Mariners outfielder Julio Rodríguez leaves game against Orioles with hamstring spasm
news_items.summary: The three-time All-Star spoke to a team athletic trainer before exiting the dugout.

news_items.headline: Brewers’ Brandon Sproat leaves game with hamstring cramp. He doesn’t expect to miss any more time
news_items.summary: “It’s just a cramp,” manager Pat Murphy said after the Brewers’ 9-4 victory over the Cleveland Guardians. “He was fine. He’ll be able to make his next start.”

news_items.headline: Texas Rangers lineup for June 18, 2026
news_items.summary: The Rangers and the Twins, in the series finale

news_items.headline: Tigers’ Wenceel Perez injured in freak accident in training room, team puts Gleyber Torres on IL
news_items.summary: Tigers manager A.J. Hinch told reporters Wenceel Perez was hit in the the face by a resistance band in the training room.

news_items.headline: Blue Jays at Red Sox; Sonny Gray looks to avoid sweep
news_items.summary: It’s another series loss for the Red Sox…

news_items.headline: MLB Home Run Predictions Today: Best HR Prop Bets, Picks, Parlay & Odds for Thursday, June 18
news_items.summary: Josh Inglis is calling for a Tyler Soderstrom bomb today, and much more, in his daily home run props for Thursday, June 18.

news_items.headline: Scottish quartet win £8k in Boston Red Sox raffle
news_items.summary: Four Scotland supporters enjoyed an even more memorable weekend than most in Boston as they became what the Red Sox believe to be the first UK winners of the club's 50/50 raffle.

news_items.headline: Guardians place Chase DeLauter on injured list and recall Kahlil Watson
news_items.summary: Cleveland outfielder Chase DeLauter has become the latest Guardians position player to go on the injured list.
